1749390.name: Interceptor
1749390.description:
Take part in an atmospheric sci-fi horror game and complete the mission ordered by the powerful Baron. Fight degenerate cyborgs and restore order on the occupied planet.

The Gameplay

Rebellious and degenerate cyborgs took over a server infrastructure and cut off power supply on an insignificant planet. The Baron, in control of this area, sends an Interceptor to restore order. The sentinel does not expect the robots to hide a secret affecting the fate of the whole planetary system. As time passes, the distinction between good and evil fades.
The player's task is to restore order eliminating rebels and their leaders.

The Setting

The rulers of the planetary system try to maintain peace and suppress the first symptoms of smoldering disturbances. But on one of the minor colonized planets, a rebellion ignites. The Barons cannot let the fragile peace of The Union collapse and allow the return of the conflagration of war.

In the system, Interceptors are the law. It is their duty to ensure that the rule of law is always upheld.
They exist to prevent another war. Despite the fact that they had previously fought on the other side of the barricade, they were able to unite. Even Barons take their strength into account.
1749390.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
